This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: CBS News and CNN staffers fear ‘disaster’ as Paramount wins Warner Bros battle - The Guardian
item.description:
1. CBS News and CNN staffers fear ‘disaster’ as Paramount wins Warner Bros battle  The Guardian
  2. Netflix ditches deal for Warner Bros. Discovery after Paramount’s offer is deemed superior  CNBC
  3. ‘Horrifying’: Hollywood blasts Trump’s role in studio sale  Politico
  4. For CNN, a Change in Ownership Means a Suddenly Uncertain Future  The New York Times
  5. Netflix follows Warren Buffett's playbook: Don't overpay, walk away  Fox Business

item.title: Jack Dorsey's Block cuts 40% of staff, 4,000+ people — and yes, it's because of AI efficiencies - Venturebeat
item.description:
1. Jack Dorsey's Block cuts 40% of staff, 4,000+ people — and yes, it's because of AI efficiencies  Venturebeat
  2. Block lays off nearly half its staff because of AI. Its CEO said most companies will do the same  CNN
  3. Block's layoffs illustrate the market conundrum at the heart of the viral Citrini report  Yahoo Finance
  4. Jack Dorsey lays off 4,000, says others will do same 'within the next year'  SFGATE
  5. Block shares soar as much as 24% as company slashes workforce by nearly half  CNBC

item.title: Treasury Proposes Rule to Sever Swiss Bank MBaer’s Access to U.S. Financial System - U.S. Department of the Treasury (.gov)
item.description:

item.title: Young woman says she was on social media 'all day long' as a child in landmark addiction trial - AP News
item.description:

  4. In Landmark Trial, Plaintiff Says Social Media Harm Started at Age 6  The New York Times

item.title: US Department of Labor proposes rule clarifying employee, independent contractor status under federal wage and hour laws - U.S. Department of Labor (.gov)
item.description:

item.title: Serial Stowaway Strikes Again—Caught In Delta Lavatories, Now Sneaks Onto United Flight To Milan - View from the Wing
item.description:
